{"projectId":"929484233158471895","sessionId":"4868231848664192534","outputComponents":[{"design":{"screens":[{"screenshot":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/7d501a8d338f4ae2aaa99ba362138926","downloadUrl":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/AP1WRLvsIGUeh4Y8poFGSSynfpEoVEoqtqc-P3nJdDZb275hBYMqdJ_runmp0qDBd81jdaAYPA9o1NGAb3VaDdRleWM2JXj6N2nPeeCcawKceNAf6UmFx6b0Nyk7Fjwsmz12QdHqVbdyJFqYRomuVO_QuIXbazl2m1K-3lC75u__O2RVBw3s7faPc8tlWjhix6zRE_K3Vn1PUEMb2IM6_kMTzuSmgoEPo7QS9ZcfCuuwUK3fna0_0f8_MNPJow"},"htmlCode":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/f769c517e73e4372811608a20ca04c09","downloadUrl":"https://contribution.usercontent.google.com/download?c=CgthaWRhX2NvZGVmeBJ6Eh1hcHBfY29tcGFuaW9uX2dlbmVyYXRlZF9maWxlcxpZCiVodG1sX2FjODY1MTUyOWUwMDRmOGRhNzQ4YzJjNGQzNGQ1YTIwEgsSBxCV1fjBpRoYAZIBIgoKcHJvamVjdF9pZBIUQhI5Mjk0ODQyMzMxNTg0NzE4OTU&filename=&opi=96797242","mimeType":"text/html"},"id":"8285cca75b1745c3979acf51b4734e19","generatedBy":"figaro_agent","width":"2560","height":"2048","title":"Iniciar Sesión - Leadiva Mint Official","prompt":"Create a desktop login screen in Spanish with a split layout. 

LEFT SIDE (~42%):
- Background: Soft mint #d9eedb.
- Top: Official Leadiva logo image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}} (black line-art rocket), height approximately 112px (h-28).
- Below logo: Wordmark "Leadiva" in dark text #1c1917.
- Subtitle: "Inteligencia comercial para Creativa Studios" (#5f6b66).
- Footer: A thin teal divider followed by "Acceso interno · Creativa Studios".
- Styling: Flat institutional style. No decorative circles, gradients, or glass effects.

RIGHT SIDE (~58%):
- Background: White.
- Content:
  - Title: "Iniciar sesión" (#1c1917).
  - Subtitle: "Usa tu correo corporativo de Creativa" (#5f6b66).
  - Form Fields: "Correo electrónico" and "Contraseña" with flat inputs.
  - Option: Checkbox for "Mostrar contraseña".
  - Action: Full-width button "Entrar" with background #05aba9.
  - Footer Link: "¿No tienes cuenta? Regístrate" (#05aba9).
  - Helper text: "SOLO DOMINIOS AUTORIZADOS" in small caps/muted text.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Use IBM Plex Sans throughout.

GENERAL STYLE:
- Flat Institutional.
- No shadows, no gradients, no purple or blue.
- Use borders #d5e8e0.
- Canvas background #f4faf6.
## Available Images
You MUST include the following images in this design. You must reference them
by putting their exact placeholder IDs in `src` attributes or CSS
`background-image` rules. Do NOT use external URLs or generate new
placeholders. Preserve these IDs exactly as written. Read each image's
Description to understand its subject, intended section, and visual role.

","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/8285cca75b1745c3979acf51b4734e19","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

- **Institutional Clarity**: Applied IBM Plex Sans with high-contrast text (#1c1917) and a vibrant teal CTA (#05aba9) for a professional, enterprise feel.
- **Simplified Visuals**: Removed all decorative elements, shadows, and gradients to adhere to the flat, institutional design principle.

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.prompt:
Create a desktop login screen in Spanish with a split layout. 

LEFT SIDE (~42%):
- Background: Soft mint #d9eedb.
- Top: Official Leadiva logo image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}} (black line-art rocket), height approximately 112px (h-28).
- Below logo: Wordmark "Leadiva" in dark text #1c1917.
- Subtitle: "Inteligencia comercial para Creativa Studios" (#5f6b66).
- Footer: A thin teal divider followed by "Acceso interno · Creativa Studios".
- Styling: Flat institutional style. No decorative circles, gradients, or glass effects.

RIGHT SIDE (~58%):
- Background: White.
- Content:
  - Title: "Iniciar sesión" (#1c1917).
  - Subtitle: "Usa tu correo corporativo de Creativa" (#5f6b66).
  - Form Fields: "Correo electrónico" and "Contraseña" with flat inputs.
  - Option: Checkbox for "Mostrar contraseña".
  - Action: Full-width button "Entrar" with background #05aba9.
  - Footer Link: "¿No tienes cuenta? Regístrate" (#05aba9).
  - Helper text: "SOLO DOMINIOS AUTORIZADOS" in small caps/muted text.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Use IBM Plex Sans throughout.

GENERAL STYLE:
- Flat Institutional.
- No shadows, no gradients, no purple or blue.
- Use borders #d5e8e0.
- Canvas background #f4faf6.

screens.title: Iniciar Sesión - Leadiva Mint Official

outputComponents.text:
I've designed the Leadiva login screen following the "Flat Institutional" aesthetic and your specific branding requirements.

### Design Highlights:
- **Official Branding**: Integrated the official black line-art rocket logo (Leadiva Logo Official) at the requested scale, paired with the dark wordmark and subtitle in the mint panel.
- **Split Layout**: A precise ~42/58 split using the Mint Pastel palette (#d9eedb and #f4faf6) to create clear visual hierarchy.
- **Institutional Clarity**: Applied IBM Plex Sans with high-contrast text (#1c1917) and a vibrant teal CTA (#05aba9) for a professional, enterprise feel.
- **Simplified Visuals**: Removed all decorative elements, shadows, and gradients to adhere to the flat, institutional design principle.

Does the layout and branding alignment meet your expectations for the Creativa Studios access portal?

outputComponents.suggestion: Create a mobile version of this login screen
Add a 'Forgot Password' flow to this screen
Design the 'Sign Up' page for authorized domains
